name: Robin des Bois : Malice à Sherwood
original_name: Robin des Bois : Malice à Sherwood
overview: Richard the Lionheart has gone to war, leaving power in the hands of Prince John. Sherwood is in danger, but Robin Hood and his gang are on hand to save the day! Meet Maid Marian with her castle insider knowledge, charming Little John, grumpy Tuck and Robin's funny cousin Scarlett. Follow the gang who with comedy, magic and friendship will save the day.

trailers.title: ROBIN DES BOIS Malice à Sherwood - Bande annonce Saison 1
